'''Sasan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] found in the [[New Plympto system/Legends|New Plympto system]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] of the [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]]. The second world in the system, Sasan was a searing rock planet.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Planet-stub}}
